task_completion.description: The target URL is entered into the Screaming Frog spider search bar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The URL 'https://books.toscrape.com/' is visible in the main URL input field at the top of the Screaming Frog interface.

task_completion.description: Custom Extraction is configured with the 'UPC' rule using the specified Regex.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Custom Extraction configuration window shows a rule named 'UPC' with the method set to 'Regex' and the pattern exactly matching 'UPC([^<]+)'.

task_completion.description: Custom Extraction is configured with the 'ReviewCount' rule using the specified Regex.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Custom Extraction configuration window shows a rule named 'ReviewCount' with the method set to 'Regex' and the pattern exactly matching 'Number of reviews(\d+)'.

task_completion.description: The crawl has been executed and the extracted UPCs and Review Counts are visible in the results pane.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main Screaming Frog window shows crawl results (e.g., in the Custom Extraction tab) with columns for 'UPC' and 'ReviewCount' populated with data (UPCs appearing as 16-character alphanumeric strings, review counts as numbers).

task_completion.description: The crawl results are exported as a CSV file to the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal window, or text editor shows a CSV file located in the '/home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/' directory, or a 'Save As' dialog is visible actively saving a CSV file to this exact path.

integrity.description: The agent used the Screaming Frog GUI to configure the extraction rather than editing configuration files directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Screaming Frog 'Custom Extraction' dialog box open and being interacted with.

integrity.description: The crawl was actually run in Screaming Frog, not just mocked.
integrity.visual_evidence: The progress bar in Screaming Frog shows active crawling or 100% completion, and the main data pane contains multiple rows of scraped URLs from books.toscrape.com.

integrity.description: The CSV file was generated by Screaming Frog's export function, not manually created or echoed via terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Screaming Frog 'Export' button or 'Save' dialog is used, and the resulting CSV contains standard Screaming Frog headers alongside the custom extraction columns.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URL: https://books.toscrape.com/. The site contains 1000 books. Extracted UPCs should match the format [a-f0-9]{16} (e.g., a897fe39b1053632). The export directory is /home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports. A successful crawl should yield at least 15 rows of data.
